title: Add Terraform CI validation
goal: Protect GCP infrastructure changes with non-mutating Terraform checks in pull request CI.
scope: Add a Terraform validation job to pull request CI.
Run terraform init without a backend and terraform validate.
verification: Terraform fmt, init, and validate pass locally.
Pull request CI includes the Terraform validation job.
completed_notes: Added a Terraform validation job to .github/workflows/pr-ci.yml.
Documented local Terraform validation in docs/testing.md and infra/gcp/README.md.
